{{CargoRelic
|name=Purge Reward Order B-1
|class_id=20988
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles ravage, Earth's will issues this reward order to encourage travelers to strike against the Demon God's forces and go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=29
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +1<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +1<br>Apostles Dominated: 25/25
|ss2=Per Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +2<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +2<br>Apostles Dominated: 25/25
|ss3=Per Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 25/25
|ss4=Per Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 25/25
|ss7=Per Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 25/25<br> (Awakened)
}}
